name: svelte-rust-clean-code
description: Clean code review and implementation guidance for Svelte and Rust projects.

interface.shortDescription: Review and write cleaner Svelte and Rust code.
interface.longDescription: Guidance for maintainable Svelte components and Rust modules, focused on clarity, small interfaces, explicit state, robust errors, and practical review checklists.
defaultPrompt: Review this Svelte component for clean code issues.
Refactor this Rust module for clarity and safety.
Check this SvelteKit and Rust PR for maintainability.
